name: FLUX.2 [max]
description: FLUX.2 [max] is Black Forest Labs' highest-quality image model — top editing consistency, strongest prompt following, and grounding search for visualizations of real-time information.

examples.name: High Resolution Scene
examples.description: Text-to-image generation at near-4MP resolution using FLUX.2's highest-quality endpoint

input.prompt: A cat on its back legs running like a human is holding a big silver fish with its arms. The cat is running away from the shop owner and has a panicked look on his face. The scene is situated in a crowded market.

code_snippets.label: typescript

examples.name: Hex Color Control
examples.description: Exact color control via hex codes — useful for brand-consistent imagery

input.prompt: A vase on a table in living room, the color of the vase is a gradient of color, starting with color #02eb3c and finishing with color #edfa3c. The flowers inside the vase have the color #ff0088

code_snippets.label: typescript

examples.name: Image Editing
examples.description: Single-reference image editing — relight or restage a product photo

input.prompt: Place this product onto a minimalist marble countertop with soft window light

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl

prompt.description: Text prompt for image generation or editing.

width.description: Width of the generated image in pixels (minimum 64). Omit to let BFL pick.

height.description: Height of the generated image in pixels (minimum 64). Omit to let BFL pick.

safety_tolerance.description: Tolerance for input/output moderation. 0 is the strictest, 5 the most permissive. Defaults to 2.

output_format.description: Output image format. Defaults to jpeg.

input_images.description: Up to 8 reference images for editing or multi-image composition. Each entry is an HTTPS URL or a data:image/...;base64,... URI.
